phone.label: Oqarasuaatip normua
phone.searchCountry: Nuna, kode imaluunniit sianerfiup siulliup ujarlugu
phone.invalid: Nunamut toqqarneqarsimasumut oqarasuaatip normua atuuttoq allattukkit.
phone.valid: Nunat tamalaat akornanni oqarasuaatip normua atuuttoq

auth.onboardingTagline: Piffinni ”I’m fine”-p aamma ”I need help”-ip akornanni inuup nammineq isumannaallisaanermut inngiaqataasoq.
auth.createSubtitle: Isumannaallisaanermut grafik illersorniarlugu allattorsimaffimmi periuseq toqqaruk.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Sumiiffimmi ineriartortitsinermik ataatsimeersuarneq atorlugu. Native Google Sign-In ineriartortitsinermi sanaartornermi sulisarpoq.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Paariuk maanna imaluunniit ingerlaqqillutit kingusinnerusukkut ilanngukkit.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 wearable-ip isumannaallisaanermut strøm-it tap-inik aammalu sivisuumik tryk-gestur-inik pilersitsisinnaavoq.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Illit isumannaallisaanermut inngiaqatitit nunap assiganik aamma sianernerni.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear angerlarsimaffimmi atuinermut, angajoqqaatut atuinermut, pilertortumik atuinermut, pisuutitsilluni sianernermut, aamma nipimik tapersersuinermut iluaqutaasinnaavoq.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Atorneqarpoq nunap assiganut, ulorianartorsiorfiusunut, isumannaatsumik tikittarnermut, aamma SOS sammivimmut.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving sumiiffimmik piumasaqarpoq, taamaalilluni angajoqqaat paasiniarsinnaaqqullugit sumi ikiorneqarnissaq pisariaqartinneqarsinnaanersoq. Tamanna kingusinnerusukkut Instillinger-imi allanngortissinnaavat.
permissions.notificationsBody: Isumannaallisaanermut piumasaqaatinut, pilertortumik nutarterinernut, aamma eqqaamasassanut illit atuutilersittartakkanut nalunaarutit kisimik atortarpagut.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isumannaallisaanermut nunap assiganut, ulorianartorsiorfiusunut, sukkasuumik avitseqatigiinnermut aamma SOS-mut sumiiffiit atortarpai. Tamanna kingusinnerusukkut Instillinger-imi allanngortissinnaavat.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nassiussavaa check-in-imut eqqaamasassanik, pilertortumik nutarterinernik, aamma isumannaallisaanermut piumasaqaatinik illit atuutilersissinnaasatit. Ussassaartutit pillugit nalunaarutit atorneq ajorpagut.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving mikrofoni atortarpaa aatsaat AI-mik inngiaqateqarnissamut imaluunniit isumannaallisaanermut sianernissamut aallartitsiguit.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving Bluetooth atortarpaa NorthStar-mik pinnersaatinik paarlaasseqatigiinnissamut, attaveqarnerup inissisimanera atuarnissaanut, aammalu atorneqarsinnaasumit isumannaallisaanermut strøm-inik aallartitsinissamut.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving aatsaat profilimi assilisassiornissaq imaluunniit isumannaallisaanermut assilisassiornissaq toqqarukku kamera atortarpaa.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving-ip flow-i taanna Instillinger-imiit aamma dashboard-imiit pissarsiarineqarsinnaanngortittarpaa.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Inngiaqatit nipi tusarnissaanut isumannaatsumik misigisoq toqqaruk.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Tappinerit pingasut SOS-mut aamma guardian-imut mianersoqqussummut eskalersinnaapput.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Tapersersorneqarnissamik pisariaqartitsiguit piffissaq eqqorlugu inussiarnersumik sianerneq aallartiguk.

jewelry.scanFailed: Qaninnermi pinnersaatinik nassaarsinnaasimanngilagut. Bluetooth misissukkit, NorthStar qanilliartortiguk, misileqqillugulu.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scannerneq aallartisinnaasimanngilaq. Bluetooth isertitsineq misissukkit misiliillutillu.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Atortumut qaninnermut isersinnaaneq qamippoq. Inuussutissarsiutini Bluetooth-mik isertitsigit, taava misiliigit.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar attaveqarnissaanut sivisuumik piffissaqarsimavoq. Qaninnerusumut nuuguk misiliillunilu.
jewelry.connectFailed: NorthStar-mut attaveqarsinnaasimanngilagut. Misissukkit akilerneqarsimasoq aamma qaninnersoq, taava misiliigit.
jewelry.emptyMessage: NorthStar charger-erlugu telefonimut una qanilliartortiguk, taava scanner-erlugu.

home.subtitle: Isumannaallisaanermut inussiarnersumik instrumentbordi
home.readyBody: Nipit, nunap assiga, pinnersaatinik, aammalu illersuisunik ataatsimik ungasissuseqarput.

map.title: Isumannaallisaanermut nunap assiga
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go siullermeerneq; Mapbox ineriartortitsinermi sanaartornermi renderertarpoq.
map.notRequested: Sumiiffimmut isernissaq piumasarineqanngilaq. Instillinger-imiit kingusinnerusukkut atorsinnaavat.
map.permissionOff: Sumiiffimmut isernissaq qaminneqarpoq. Instillinger-imi atukkit, isumannaallisaanermut nunap assiga ilinnut centereqqullugu.
map.timeout: Sumiiffiit naatsorsuutigisamiit sivisuneruvoq. Ersarissumik nalunaaqutsiussamik allamut nuugit misiliillutillu.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Sumiiffiit tatigineqarsinnaasut uani takussaapput sukkasuumik isernissamut.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Sianerneq aallartiguk imaluunniit piareersimaguit allakkat allaguk.

history.clearMessage: Taamaalilluni atortumiit AI-mik allakkanik allanneqarsimasunik peersitsivoq.
history.title: Oqaloqatigiinnerup oqaluttuassartaa
history.subtitle: AI inngiaqatimi allakkat atortumi tassani toqqoqqapput.
history.emptyMessage: Inngiaqatitit AI oqaloqatigiinnerit siullerpaamik sianernerup kingorna uani takussaapput.

voices.title: Isumannaallisaanermut sianerfigisakka
voices.subtitle: Inngiaqatit nipi tusarnissaanut eqqortumik misigisoq toqqaruk.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Netværki imaluunniit Hume uppernarsaatinik atuisinnaanngippata ataatsimoorussamik akissuteqaatit atorlugit.
settings.privacyBody: Atortumi tassani lokaldata-t toqqoqqasut export-erlugit imaluunniit piiakkit.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Taamaalilluni profilit, inissititersimasatit, pilertortumik attaveqarfiit, oqaloqatigiinnerup oqaluttuassartaa, akuersissutinik eqqaamasassanik, aammalu najukkami akuersissutinik ataatsimiinneq atortumiit peertarpai.

sections.privacySubtitle: Oqaluttuassartaq, avammut tuniniaaneq, piiaaneq, aamma politikki

contacts.title: Ajornartorsiornermi attaveqarfiit
contacts.subtitle: Isumannaallisaanermut ingerlaarnermi inuit tatigineqarsinnaasut pissarsiarineqarsinnaapput.
contacts.name: Aqqa
contacts.emptyMessage: Ilanngukkit upperisat, taamaalillutik isumannaallisaanermut pisariaqartitsisoqarpat piareersimassapput.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Attaveqarfik una annaassinnaasimanngilagut. Immikkuualuttut misissukkit misiliillutillu.

friends.title: Ikinngutit
friends.subtitle: Ingerlatsisut, piumasaqaatit, aamma pilertortumik grafik.
friends.emptyMessage: Ikinngutit aammalu angajoqqaat tatigineqarsinnaasut ilanngunneqarpata uani takussaapput.

emergency.title: Ajornartorsiut SOS
emergency.subtitle: Aatsaat piaartumik tapersersorneqarnissamik pisariaqartitsiguit escalate.
emergency.body: Taanna isumannaallisaanermut tunngasunik nalunaaruteqartitsissaaq aammalu ajunaarnersuaqarnerani attaveqarfiit piareersarlugit.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Sumiiffimmi avitseqatigiinneq stub piareersimavoq. Link-inik live-nik nassiussinissamut backend-imi avitseqatigiinnermut kingulleq attavigiuk.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Marloriaq NorthStar-it tooruk isumannaallisaanermut orange-mik ikkussinissamut.
capybearTap.body: Gesture route piareersimavoq BLE-mik pisussaq ledning-imut.

errors.voiceQueued: Paasissutissaq annaaneqarpoq. Taanna nassiunneqassaaq nipit inngiaqatigisaat attaveqaqqilerpat.
errors.microphone: Nipit atorlugit sianernissamut mikrofonimik atuineq pisariaqarpoq. Instillinger-imi atorsinnaavat, imaluunniit taarsiullugu allakkat allatsinnaavatit.
errors.billing: Onlinekkut nipilersortarfik piffissap ilaani atorneqarsinnaanngilaq. Offline-imik inngiaqateqarnikkut ingerlaqqissinnaavutit.
errors.authentication: Nipit inngiaqatigisaata ataatsimiinneq una uppernarsarsinnaasimanngilaa. Isertitsigit imaluunniit offline-imi inngiaqatitit maannamut atukkit.
errors.timeout: Nipit inngiaqatigisaata akissuteqarnissaminut sivisuumik piffissaqarsimavoq. Attaveqaatit misissukkit misiliillutillu.
errors.network: Nipit inngiaqatigisaat tikissinnaasimanngilagut. Attaveqarnerit misissukkit, taava misiliigit imaluunniit offline-imik ingerlaqqigit.
errors.genericVoice: Nipit atorlugit sianerneq arlaannik ajoqusersimavoq. Misilittariaqarpat, imaluunniit offline-imi inngiaqatitit ingerlateqqikkit.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving isumannaallisaanermut aamma AI inngiaqateqarnissamut mikrofonimik atuisoqartariaqarpoq.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving isumannaallisaanermut nunap assiga aamma isumannaallisaanermut qanittukkut sumiiffiit atortarpai.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving atorlugu Bluetooth isumannaallisaanermut pinnersaatinut NorthStar-mut attaveqarsinnaavoq.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Isernissamut periarfissaq una build-imi matumani atorneqarsinnaanngilaq.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo-mode-mi taamaallaat sumiiffimmi paasissutissat salluliat atorneqartarput. Kiffartuussissutit attavillit kinaassusersiorneqanngillat, app-ilu reload-erpat session una nuleriissaaq.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Uppernarsaanermut kode atuutinngilaq imaluunniit pisoqaavoq. Kode nutaaq qinnutigပြီးeqqillutillu.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Isernissamut uppernarsaanneq sivisuallaarpoq. Att اتصالissutit misissoriarlugu misileqqigit.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Isernissamut kiffartuussissut attavigisinnaanngilarput. Att اتصالissutit misissoriarlugu misileqqigit.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Isumannaallisaanermut nun карта загрузкаarsinnaanngilaq. Att اتصالissutit misissoriarlugu misileqqigit.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Maannakkut sumiiffik उपलब्धanngilaq. Sumiiffik kingullermik %{capturedAt}-imi toqqorneqartoq көрсетneqarpoq.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Sumiiffiit avinneqarsinnaanngilaq. Sumiiffimmut access misissoriarlugu misileqqigit.
releaseCritical.blePermission: Bluetooth-imut access выключено. Settings-imi фаъолериarlugu misileqqigit.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth pairing устройство imaluunniit build una atorlugu periarfissaanngilaq.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: NorthStar nassaarisinnaanngilarput. Qanitsillugu, Bluetooth misissoriarlugu misileqqigit.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: NorthStar-imut att连接arsinnaanngilarput. Charge-qarnera qan proximity-qarneralu qulakkeeriarlugit misileqqigit.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Oqarasuaatip normunut ikkussivia ammarpoq; sianerneq uppernarsarneqanngilaq.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Nipimik ikinngut maanna atorneqarsinnaanngilaq. Kingusinnerusukkut misileqqigit imaluunniit offline companion atorlugu ingerlaqqigit.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
